core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk aesthetics with Swiss Utility.
Emotion First: The site must feel FAST and RELIABLE.
Content is King: Every pixel serves the conversion.
Negative Space: Value the void. Deep blacks, wide gaps.
Contrast: Neon on Black. High legibility, high impact.

primary.description: Neon Cyan - Use for Primary CTAs and Active States

secondary.description: Electric Purple - Use for depth, gradients, and secondary highlights

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky Headers, Modal Overlays, Floating Cards

grid_overlay.css: background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 50px 50px;

tracing_beam.description: A glowing gradient line that traces the border of pricing cards or hero sections.
tracing_beam.implementation: Use Framer Motion to animate SVG path or CSS mask-image.

bento_grid.rules: Mix col-span-2 and row-span-2 for variety. Never equal squares.

pricing_table.style: Comparative Grid with 'Best Value' highlighted via Neon Glow and Scale.

forms.style: Minimalist, single-column for mobile, two-column for desktop. Floating labels or clear top labels.

shadcn_mappings.button: Button (Customize: rounded-none or sharp pill, neon hover effects)
shadcn_mappings.card: Card (Remove default bg, apply glass style)

custom_components.TariffGrid: Grid display of 10 plans with filtering (Home/Business).
custom_components.ConnectionForm: Multi-step or Long-form with sections (Personal, Address, Plan).

tariff_plans.description: Display 10 Plans. Categories: Residential, Business, Gamer. Use Tabs to filter.

new_connection.description: Form: Name, Email, Phone, Address, Plan Selection.
new_connection.layout: Central Form Container with Trust Indicators (Secure, Fast) on side.

contact_us.layout: Two column: Info Left, Form Right.

my_services.description: Informational Cards about: Speed Boost, Static IP, Support 24/7, OTT Bundles.

general: Use the 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Implement the 'Cyber-Utility' dark theme. Avoid pure black backgrounds; use #030712.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (color shift + scale).
backend_integration: Ensure forms submit to the FastAPI backend.
Handle loading states (disable button, show spinner).
Handle error states (red border on inputs, toast message).
Handle success states (toast message, redirect or clear form).

specific_pages.TariffPlans: Create a JSON array of 10 plans with: id, name, speed, price, benefits, type (Home/Business). Map this to the UI.
specific_pages.NewConnection: POST /api/connections. Payload: { name, email, phone, address, plan_id }.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients larger than 20% of the screen.
Do not center-align long text blocks.
